summary: Iteration 39 - Skip Video Toggle & Channel Format Verification - ALL TESTS PASSED. Verified: (1) Login works with test@agentflow.com/password123, (2) Marketing Studio page at /marketing/studio loads with full form, (3) Skip video toggle exists with data-testid='skip-video-toggle' below PLATFORMS section, (4) Skip video toggle label changes from 'Generate commercial video' to 'Campaign without video (faster)' when clicked, (5) All 8 platforms visible: WhatsApp, Instagram, Facebook, TikTok, Google Ads, Telegram, Email, SMS, (6) Execution Mode buttons (Semi-Automatic/Automatic) visible, (7) Backend accepts skip_video:true in POST /api/campaigns/pipeline payload - confirmed in result field, (8) Campaign detail Content tab shows channel selector with format badges (1:1, 9:16, 16:9), (9) TikTok mockup shows 9:16 vertical format with TikTok UI elements (hearts, comments, share), (10) Facebook mockup shows 16:9 horizontal with Curtir/Comentar/Compartilhar, (11) WhatsApp mockup shows 1:1 square with chat bubble UI, (12) Email mockup shows email template with From/Subject, (13) Image/Video toggle buttons work, (14) Video remix endpoint POST /api/campaigns/pipeline/{id}/remix-audio returns {status:'remixing'}

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 39: Skip video toggle verified at data-testid='skip-video-toggle', positioned below PLATFORMS section. Backend accepts skip_video:true in POST /api/campaigns/pipeline and stores it in result.skip_video. All 8 channels have proper format-specific mockups with format badges. TikTok 9:16, Facebook 16:9, WhatsApp/Instagram 1:1. Image/Video toggle works with data-testid='toggle-image-{channel}' and 'toggle-video-{channel}'. Remix-audio API at POST /api/campaigns/pipeline/{id}/remix-audio returns {status:'remixing'}.
